lg.$description: Dominant radius for all card and panel surfaces; card-surface, dashboard-card, trip-card, day-tile, planner-item-card, modal-sheet

full.$description: Pills and circular elements; progress-pill, role-pill, status-pill, icon-button, form buttons

card.$description: Semantic alias for the main card surface radius. References radius.lg so card radius can change independently of the ordinal scale

input.$description: Semantic alias for input field radius. References radius.md
